impact: Gives the PP&D daemon deterministic failure-context programming for fixture-validator retries: the next worker is told to inspect the committed JSON fixture shape before writing another validator, and the retry is constrained away from broad contracts, live crawl code, authenticated automation, or fixture rewrites unless explicitly allowed.
summary: Add fixture-shape retry guidance for missing-field validator failures
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
